candidate_sources_rejected: androgenetic-alopecia summaries without exact guideline sections
rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
Unopened summaries were not used for item-level mapping.
population_applicability: Partial: exact for alopecia areata across ages; not exact for every androgenetic, telogen, hormonal, nutritional, infectious, or scarring hair-loss cause.
setting_applicability: Direct for community and hospital dermatology assessment; partial for generic GP hair-loss review.
UAE_applicability: No exact UAE alopecia guideline was identified; BAD recommendations require UAE clinician review and local availability assessment.
recency_verification: The BAD living guideline published in 2024 and corrected in 2025 was opened in full on 2026-07-12.
superseded_check: The BAD page identifies this as its current living alopecia-areata guideline.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped alopecia-areata history, onset, progression, distribution, triggers, quality-of-life, family autoimmune history, severity, records, referral, and monitoring fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports full history including site, type, extent, stability, onset, progression, triggers, quality of life, psychological impact, family autoimmune history, photography, severity assessment, and specialist referral criteria.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped patchy or diffuse loss, scalp distribution, scale or scarring differential, hair-pull, trichoscopy, nail findings, and case-by-case thyroid or prior-record review.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Describes patchy or diffuse hair loss, scalp and body distribution, exclamation-mark hairs, nail involvement, trichoscopy, scarring and scaling differentials, hair-pull context, and case-by-case testing when diagnosis or comorbidity warrants it.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped psychological support and safety assessment only when indicated and clinician-documented.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented psychological support, formal intervention or referral, and suicide-risk assessment when indicated.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped clinician-led management, shared priorities, medication decisions, expectation discussion, information, and arranged follow-up without doses.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-led assessment, shared priorities, severity tracking, expectation discussion, treatment selection, monitoring, and patient information without authorising autonomous treatment output.

unresolved_source_gaps: Androgenetic alopecia, broad balding or receding-hairline terms, scalp pain or itch, hormonal history, systemic symptoms, iron and vitamin testing, scalp infection, hair-care advice, and fixed three-month review timing remain unsupported.
Alopecia type, severity, and treatment remain clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
